name: frigate-openclaw-notifier
description: Frigate MQTT notifier that sends direct WhatsApp alerts through OpenClaw.

scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env --import tsx ./src/index.ts; else node --import tsx ./src/index.ts; fi'
scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run test
